metadata.name: scaffold-framework
metadata.summary: A web framework that make it easy to build apps according to SOLID & DDD principles and with layered/onion architecture.

modules.name: scaffold.di
documentation: An extremely simple DI container (in <100 lines of code) with auto-wiring based on type hints.

methods.name: scaffold.web.assets.Assets.get_assets_by_pattern
documentation: Retrieve asset URLs based on a pathlib glob pattern.

methods.name: scaffold.web.assets.Assets.__getitem__
documentation: Retrieve a single asset URL by the relative path.

modules.name: scaffold.uuid7
documentation:
A UUID 7 implementation that allows to parametrize the timestamp
(other implementations I found did not allow that and instead always used the current time).

functions.name: scaffold.uuid7.uuid7
documentation:
Generate a UUID version 7.

Args:
    timestamp (float, optional): A timestamp in seconds. Uses current time if not provided.

Returns:
    uuid.UUID: A UUID version 7.

type.name: Callable[Concatenate[S, P], R] | Callable[Concatenate[S, P], Awaitable[R]]

methods.name: scaffold.web.base_app.BaseWebApp.__get_topologically_sorted_controller_classes
documentation: Gets controllers in their topological order.

methods.name: scaffold.persistence.GenericSqlRepository._map_entity_to_dto
documentation: Convert a domain entity to a DTO.

methods.name: scaffold.persistence.GenericSqlRepository._map_dto_to_entity
documentation: Convert a DTO to a domain entity.

modules.name: scaffold.web.dev_server
documentation:
A simple and easy to understand ASGI dev server built to make debugging easy and for education purposes.
It supports HTTP/1.1 and WebSockets.
